// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.NoTagService, global::TestNamespace.NoTagService>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.INoTagService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.NoTagService>());
            }

            if (tags.Contains("Tag1"))
            {
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service>();
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ITag1Service>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service>());
            }

            if (tags.Contains("Tag1") || tags.Contains("Tag2"))
            {
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService, global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IBothTagsService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>());
            }

            if (tags.Contains("Tag2"))
            {
                services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service>();
                services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.ITag2Service>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service>());
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
